title: Salesforce Platform Manager
responsibilities: Oversee the health, scalability, and release integrity of the Salesforce ecosystem
Serve as primary custodian of environments, ensuring production stability
Architect a modern, federated development strategy
Establish a Center of Excellence to enable product teams to deploy code safely
Manage the full lifecycle of Salesforce releases including major seasonal updates
Manage continuous CI/CD pipelines using Copado
Support streamlining of release management and testing environments for Salesforce, Agentforce, and Data Cloud
Work in Salesforce.com development environment with custom objects, workflows, triggers, SOQL & SOSL
Apply best practices and design patterns to build applications on Force.com platform
Translate complex technical releases into business-friendly roadmaps
must_have_skills: 5+ years experience in Salesforce Platform Management or Salesforce Architecture
Expert-level proficiency with Copado for CI/CD and release orchestration
Deep understanding of Salesforce multi-tenant architecture
Communication and ability to translate complex technical releases into business-friendly roadmaps
Experience managing Business Critical production environments
Work with Salesforce's premier support tiers
nice_to_have_skills: Salesforce Certified Development Lifecycle and Deployment Designer
